SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JESSE FARRAR LEHRMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOROTHY CHAO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
